textPlain: To get rid of that acne, use benzoyl peroxide 2.5% but like use it 3 times a day, then after 2 days, use it twice a day, and after than just 1 time a day. All your acne will be gone in about 5 days.A lot of people give up on it because it doesn't work instantly. You have to use a lot. Also try really hard to wash your fingers or use a napkin to apply it - if it gets on your clothes the clothing will fade in random spots after washing. Avoid letting it touch clothing.
